Upstate New York Full-Service Protection

Complete Pest Control Solutions

No pest is too tough for Sasquatch. From stubborn infestations to preventative maintenance, our team delivers rugged, reliable service for homes, cabins, farms, rental properties, and businesses across Upstate New York.

Get Free Estimate Explore Services

Fast Response

Prompt inspections and treatments designed to stop infestations before they spread.

Rugged Protection

Interior, exterior, and exclusion strategies built for New York weather and real-world pressure.

Residential & Commercial

Homes, hotels, restaurants, rental properties, barns, and outbuildings all get tailored service.

Every pest problem needs a different kind of fight

Sasquatch Pest Control uses targeted treatments, prevention methods, and ongoing maintenance plans to match the pest, the property, and the severity of the issue. Below you’ll find our full service lineup with what each treatment includes and what you can expect during the visit.

🐜

Ant Control

We tackle carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants with targeted interior and exterior treatments that go after the colony, not just the visible trail. This service is ideal for kitchens, foundations, patios, and damp wood areas where ants commonly establish activity.

What to expect

A property inspection, identification of nesting and entry points, perimeter treatment, and guidance on reducing moisture and food sources around the structure.

Get Free Estimate
🛏️

Bed Bug Treatment

Bed bugs demand a thorough, disciplined approach, which is why we offer heat treatments, chemical treatments, and detailed inspections for both hotel rooms and residential spaces. We focus on disrupting the infestation at every stage, from harborages in beds and furniture to cracks, seams, and baseboards.

What to expect

An intensive inspection, treatment plan based on the severity of activity, preparation instructions, and follow-up recommendations to confirm the population has been eliminated.

Get Free Estimate
🪳

Cockroach Extermination

From German cockroaches in kitchens to larger American cockroaches in basements and utility spaces, our extermination plans combine gel baits, insect growth regulators, and residual sprays. The goal is to break the breeding cycle and remove the conditions that allow roaches to thrive.

What to expect

Inspection of hot spots, food and moisture source checks, targeted treatment in hiding areas, and a practical prevention plan for sanitation and sealing access points.

Get Free Estimate
🦟

Mosquito Control

Our mosquito control service is built for outdoor comfort, property enjoyment, and event-ready protection. We use seasonal barrier sprays and standing water treatment to reduce breeding pressure around lawns, patios, decks, and wooded edges.

What to expect

A review of problem areas, treatment around vegetation and shaded resting spots, water source recommendations, and a schedule that supports peak mosquito season.

Get Free Estimate
🐭

Rodent Control

Mice and rats can damage insulation, chew wiring, and contaminate stored food fast, so our rodent control program is built for immediate action and long-term exclusion. We handle mice, Norway rats, and roof-rat activity using snap traps, tamper-resistant bait stations, and structural sealing recommendations.

What to expect

A full inspection for droppings, nesting, and entry points, strategic trap or bait placement, and a clear plan for closing the gaps rodents use to get inside.

Get Free Estimate
🐝

Wasp & Bee Removal

Yellowjackets, hornets, and bald-faced hornets can become dangerous quickly, especially near doorways, eaves, porches, and play areas. We provide nest removal and, when possible, hive relocation to protect people while addressing the infestation safely and decisively.

What to expect

A safe site assessment, protective treatment or removal method based on the species, and advice for preventing future nesting in vulnerable exterior spaces.

Get Free Estimate
🕷️

Spider Control

Cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and common house spiders often show up in garages, basements, sheds, and corners where insects are already active. Our spider control service focuses on perimeter treatments and reducing the prey sources that attract them indoors.

What to expect

A review of webbing and harborage areas, exterior perimeter treatment, and guidance for decluttering storage zones and sealing gaps around windows and utility penetrations.

Get Free Estimate
🏠

Termite Inspection & Treatment

Subterranean termites can quietly damage framing, sill plates, and structural components before anyone notices visible signs. We provide thorough inspections, Termidor treatments, bait systems, and annual checkups to help protect one of your biggest investments.

What to expect

A foundation-to-attic evaluation, identification of moisture risks and termite activity, a treatment recommendation based on findings, and annual monitoring options for peace of mind.

Get Free Estimate
🦝

Wildlife Removal

Raccoons, skunks, groundhogs, and squirrels can tear into attics, under decks, crawl spaces, and landscaping. We use humane live trapping and exclusion methods to remove the animals and reduce the chance of them returning to the same space.

What to expect

A property-specific wildlife assessment, safe removal or trapping strategy, sealing of access points, and repair recommendations for damaged openings or nesting locations.

Get Free Estimate
🦟

Tick & Flea Treatment

Deer ticks, dog ticks, and fleas can turn yards and homes into uncomfortable, high-risk environments for families and pets. We combine yard sprays and indoor flea treatments to target both the outdoor source and the interior infestation cycle.

What to expect

A treatment plan for grass, shaded edges, pet-rest areas, and interior problem zones, along with practical guidance for reducing re-infestation pressure from wildlife and pets.

Get Free Estimate
🪲

Stink Bug Control

Brown marmorated stink bugs often invade homes in the fall, hiding in walls, windows, and attic spaces before making their way inside. Our exclusion and perimeter treatments help keep these seasonal invaders outside where they belong.

What to expect

A seasonal inspection, treatment of key entry points, recommendations for sealing gaps, and a fall-prevention strategy that reduces overwintering activity.

Get Free Estimate
🛡️

General Pest Prevention Plans

If you want year-round defense, our prevention plans are designed to cover the most common pests before they become a major problem. We offer quarterly, bi-monthly, and monthly plans with discounted pricing for ongoing maintenance and proactive protection.

What to expect

Scheduled service visits, targeted perimeter treatments, interior touch-ups as needed, and a dependable plan that helps keep ants, spiders, roaches, and other pests from returning.

Get Free Estimate

Pricing is built around your property, not a one-size-fits-all guess

All estimates are free. Final pricing depends on property size, pest type, access conditions, and how severe the problem is. We offer both one-time treatments for urgent issues and ongoing maintenance plans for long-term protection.

Common options

  • • One-time inspections and corrective treatments
  • • Seasonal mosquito, tick, and flea programs
  • • Quarterly, bi-monthly, and monthly protection plans
  • • Commercial service schedules for businesses and rentals
Request Your Free Estimate

Frequently asked questions

Do you treat both homes and commercial properties?

Yes. We service houses, apartments, cabins, restaurants, hotels, offices, farms, and other properties across Upstate New York.

How fast can you get started?

Response times depend on scheduling and the type of pest, but we work hard to provide prompt inspections and fast treatment options for urgent problems.

Are your prevention plans worth it?

For many properties, yes. Ongoing service helps stop recurring pest pressure, protects vulnerable areas, and often costs less than repeated emergency treatments.

Can you help after hours or for special events?

We can often help with event-related mosquito control and urgent infestations. Reach out through the contact page and we’ll review the situation quickly.

Ready When You Are

Get the Sasquatch team on your side

Whether you’re dealing with a single pest problem or want a recurring protection plan, we’re ready to build a solution that fits your property and your budget.

Contact Us Today See Common Pests
